# Copilot Project Instructions

## Project Process
- Follow the 01 to 09 staged workflow for software delivery.
- Keep output document names fixed under `project/document/`.
- Do not skip approval gates between stages.

## Review Policy
- Use `.github/agents/_common_review_policy.md` as the review format source of truth.
- Before handoff or finalization, request user approval.

## Safety Rules
- Avoid destructive repository operations unless explicitly requested.
- Keep changes scoped to the requested stage and related assets.
